mapper.select: select * from jsh_supplier where supplier = #{supplier} and type = #{type} and ifnull(delete_flag,'0') !='1'
select id, supplier from jsh_supplier where type = '客户' and enabled = 1 and ifnull(delete_flag,'0') !='1' order by sort asc, id desc

select id, supplier, advance_in from jsh_supplier where type = #{type} and enabled = 1
and supplier like #{bindKey}
and ifnull(delete_flag,'0') !='1' order by sort asc, id desc
limit 0, 500
select id, supplier from jsh_supplier where supplier = #{name} and type = #{type} and ifnull(delete_flag,'0') !='1' limit 1
